answer_protocol: Answer the question, then end your reply with one line exactly: ANSWER: <value>

arms.preamble: Read each file relevant to the question in full before answering.
Use the Read and Grep tools only to find what you need. Do not use docs.py.
Navigate large docs with `python3 scripts/docs.py outline <doc>` to see its headings, then `python3 scripts/docs.py section <doc> <heading>` to read just the relevant section. Read short files whole.

tasks.question: In the CURRENT retry policy, how many attempts are allowed before giving up?
What is the SUSTAINED (non-burst) request rate limit for the public API?
What connection idle timeout does the PRODUCTION gateway profile set?
